item.title: MTG Scorekeeper
item.description: A life-and-counter tracker for Magic: The Gathering — life totals, poison, commander damage, and whatever else I decide to add next. I built it to learn the front-end stack hands-on and to have a tracker I can extend on my own timeline instead of relying on someone else’s published app.

item.title: Home Lab
item.description: A home server running Home Assistant for automation, Pi-hole for network-wide ad blocking, and an OpenClaw instance I use as a local-LLM personal assistant — today it talks to Home Assistant; more ambitious uses are in progress. Private infrastructure where I’m the admin, the user, and the on-call engineer.
